basic_details.job_title: IIT BHU Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology BHU (IIT BHU)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology BHU (IIT BHU) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology BHU has released the official notification for Project Technical Support-III posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/Physically Handicapped/Female candidates will be eligible for age relaxation as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Pharm/M.S. (Pharm)/M.Tech(Pharm)/M.Tech in Medicinal Chemistry/Pharmaceutical Chemistry (First Class) OR Second Class with 1 year research experience.
qualification.details: Project Technical Support-III: First class in M.Pharm/M.S. (Pharm)/M.Tech(Pharm)/M.Tech in Medicinal Chemistry/Pharmaceutical Chemistry. Second class M.Pharm/M.S. (Pharm)/M.Tech(Pharm)/M.Tech in Medicinal Chemistry/Pharmaceutical Chemistry along with one year research experience.

salary_details.details: Project Technical Support-III: Rs. 28,000 + 20% HRA per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT BHU Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT BHU Project Technical Support-III recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Technical Support-III position at IIT BHU is 26th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for Project Technical Support-III?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a First Class M.Pharm/M.S. (Pharm)/M.Tech(Pharm)/M.Tech in Medicinal Chemistry/Pharmaceutical Chemistry, or Second Class with 1 year of research experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Technical Support-III position is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/Physically Handicapped/Female candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support-III post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 28,000 plus 20% House Rent Allowance (HRA) per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: Applications should be sent via email to Dr. Rajnish Kumar at [email protected] with the subject line "Application for Project Technical Support (III) in ICMR-funded project".

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Technical Support-III position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting candidates based on their applications, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: You need to submit self-attested copies of all mark-sheets, certificates, and details of any research or other experience along with your application.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a project-based recruitment, meaning the position is temporary and tied to the duration of the project.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the Important Links section provided in this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" link.
